 {"id":"bd-3gkt","title":"No-mock supervision detection tests (systemd/launchd/container/agent)","description":"## Goal
Validate supervision detection + routing with real data (no mocks); provide fixtures consumed by E2E supervision gating tests.

## Scope
- Unit tests for systemd/launchd parsing, cgroup/container supervision markers, agent supervision detection.
- Integration tests on fixture snapshots for expected supervisor types.
- Produce supervision fixtures + expected routing metadata for E2E bead bd-12r5.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs per case: event, timestamp, supervisor_type, pid, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Store fixtures under `test/fixtures/supervision/` (sanitized + manifest).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit coverage for detection/parsing helpers without mocks.
- [ ] Integration coverage on real host or fixtures (platform-conditional).
- [ ] Fixtures + logs are consumable by bd-12r5 E2E script.
- [ ] JSONL logs emitted per case.

## Test Plan
- Unit: parse outputs from systemctl/launchctl and cgroup markers.
- Integration: run detection on fixture snapshots and validate expected supervisor types.

 {"id":"bd-3hb3","title":"E2E: install/update/rollback scripts with detailed logging","description":"## Goal
Add comprehensive E2E scripts for install.sh + update + rollback with verbose logging.

## Scope / Subtasks
- Containerized install tests (clean system, verify success).
- Tampered binary/invalid checksum failure path.
- Update + rollback flows with version verification.
- JSONL logs + checksums + timing metrics captured as artifacts.
- Cross-platform matrix where possible (linux/mac/windows runners).

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL schema fields: event, timestamp, phase, command, exit_code, duration_ms, checksums, artifacts[].
- Artifact bundle: logs + checksums + resolved version info.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] E2E install scripts pass across supported platforms/containers.
- [ ] Fail paths are validated and logged clearly.
- [ ] Artifacts include logs + checksums + versions.
- [ ] JSONL schema validation passes.

## Test Plan
- E2E: docker-based runs for install/update/rollback.
- Logging: JSONL schema validation + artifact manifest validation.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:05:23.212974556Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T19:59:21.449151353Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3hb3","depends_on_id":"bd-jg2d","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-02T19:59:21.449114695Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3hb3","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:05:23.220380171Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3hb3","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:22:30.967761891Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3hb3","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:05:23.228792047Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3hb3","depends_on_id":"process_triage-ica.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:05:23.234889641Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3jpe","title":"Add differential and goal-oriented options to agent plan","description":"## Task
Add differential and goal-oriented option parsing to `pt agent plan` for API surface harmonization.

**SCOPE LIMITATION**: This bead implements CLI flag parsing only. Full feature implementation is deferred to:
- Differential mode: process_triage-9k8.2 (EPIC: Phase 11 - Differential Analysis)
- Goal-oriented: process_triage-95m.* (EPIC: Phase 13 - Goal-Oriented Optimization)
- Predictions: process_triage-yxt.* (EPIC: Phase 12 - Trajectory Prediction)

## Current Implementation
```
pt agent plan [OPTIONS]
  --session <id>           Resume existing session
  --max-candidates <N>     Maximum candidates
  --min-posterior <f64>    Minimum posterior (alias: --threshold)
  --only <filter>          Filter by recommendation
  --deep                   Force deep scan
  --min-age <seconds>      Minimum process age
```

## New Options (Stub Implementation for v1)

### Differential Mode Flags
```
--since <session-id>       Compare against prior session
--since-time <ts|dur>      Compare against time (e.g., "2h", "2026-01-15T12:00:00Z")
```

### Goal-Oriented Flags
```
--goal "<target>"          Resource recovery goal (format: "free 4GB RAM")
```

### Predictive Mode Flags
```
--include-predictions      Add trajectory analysis to output
```

## Implementation Strategy

### Phase 1 (This Bead): Parse flags, return not-implemented warning
```rust
// Add to AgentPlanArgs
#[arg(long, help = "Compare against prior session (coming in v1.2)")]
since: Option<String>,

#[arg(long, help = "Compare against time (coming in v1.2)")]
since_time: Option<String>,

#[arg(long, help = "Resource recovery goal (coming in v1.2)")]
goal: Option<String>,

#[arg(long, help = "Add trajectory analysis (coming in v1.2)")]
include_predictions: bool,
```

### Behavior for v1 (Stub)
When any of these flags are used, the plan is generated normally BUT includes a warning:

```json
{
  "session_id": "pt-20260122-...",
  "candidates": [...],
  "stub_flags": {
    "warning": "feature_not_implemented",
    "message": "Some flags are parsed but not yet functional",
    "flags_used": ["--since"],
    "flags_ignored": ["--since"],
    "workaround": "Use pt agent diff for manual comparison",
    "planned_release": "v1.2"
  }
}
```

**Key behaviors:**
- Exit code: 0 (success with warning, not error)
- Plan is still generated (flags are ignored, not blocking)
- Warning appears in both JSON and summary formats
- Agents can discover the API surface via --help
- Scripts using these flags degrade gracefully

### Phase 2 (Future Beads): Full implementation
- Differential: Depends on session comparison infrastructure
- Goal-oriented: Depends on optimization engine
- Predictions: Depends on trajectory modeling

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `--since`, `--since-time`, `--goal`, `--include-predictions` flags parse correctly
- [ ] Using these flags returns normal plan WITH warning, not error
- [ ] Help text documents flags with "(coming in v1.2)" notes
- [ ] Exit code 0 even when using stub flags
- [ ] Plan output unchanged when flags not used
- [ ] Warning in both JSON and summary formats
- [ ] `stub_flags` section clearly lists which flags were used and ignored

## Testing Requirements

### Unit Tests
```rust
#[test]
fn test_plan_parses_since_flag() {
    // --since value is captured
}

#[test]
fn test_plan_parses_goal_flag() {
    // --goal "free 4GB RAM" is captured
}

#[test]
fn test_plan_stub_flags_produces_warning() {
    // Using --since results in stub_flags warning in output
}

#[test]
fn test_plan_stub_flags_still_generates_plan() {
    // Plan candidates still present when stub flags used
}

#[test]
fn test_plan_no_warning_without_stub_flags() {
    // Normal plan without stub flags has no stub_flags section
}
```

### E2E Test Script (test/e2e_plan_future_flags.sh)
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# E2E test for plan command future flags (stub implementation)

set -euo pipefail
LOG="test/logs/e2e_plan_future_flags_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log"
mkdir -p test/logs

log() { echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] $*" | tee -a "$LOG"; }

log "=== E2E Test: plan future flags (stubs) ==="

# Test --since flag parsing
log "Testing --since flag..."
set +e
OUTPUT=$(pt-core agent plan --since "fake-session" --format json 2>&1)
EXIT_CODE=$?
set -e

log "Exit code: $EXIT_CODE"

# Verify exit code is 0 (success with warning)
if [ "$EXIT_CODE" -eq 0 ]; then
    log "✓ Exit code 0 (success with warning)"
else
    log "⚠ Exit code $EXIT_CODE (may be acceptable if error is clear)"
fi

# Verify warning is present
if echo "$OUTPUT" | jq -e ".stub_flags.warning == \"feature_not_implemented\"" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    log "✓ --since returns not-implemented warning"
    USED=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | jq -r ".stub_flags.flags_used | join(\", \")")
    log "  Flags used: $USED"
elif echo "$OUTPUT" | jq -e ".warning" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    log "✓ Warning present (different structure)"
else
    log "✗ --since should return warning"
    echo "$OUTPUT" | head -20 >> "$LOG"
    exit 1
fi

# Verify plan is still generated
if echo "$OUTPUT" | jq -e ".session_id or .candidates" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    log "✓ Plan still generated despite stub flag"
else
    log "⚠ Plan might not be generated (check output)"
fi

# Test --goal flag parsing  
log "Testing --goal flag..."
set +e
OUTPUT=$(pt-core agent plan --goal "free 4GB RAM" --format json 2>&1)
EXIT_CODE=$?
set -e

if [ "$EXIT_CODE" -eq 0 ]; then
    log "✓ --goal accepted (exit 0)"
else
    log "⚠ --goal exit code $EXIT_CODE"
fi

if echo "$OUTPUT" | jq -e ".stub_flags or .warning" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    log "✓ --goal returns warning"
else
    log "✗ --goal should return warning"
    exit 1
fi

# Test --include-predictions flag
log "Testing --include-predictions flag..."
set +e
OUTPUT=$(pt-core agent plan --include-predictions --format json 2>&1)
EXIT_CODE=$?
set -e

if [ "$EXIT_CODE" -eq 0 ]; then
    log "✓ --include-predictions accepted (exit 0)"
else
    log "⚠ --include-predictions exit code $EXIT_CODE"
fi

if echo "$OUTPUT" | jq -e ".stub_flags or .warning" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    log "✓ --include-predictions returns warning"
else
    log "✗ --include-predictions should return warning"
    exit 1
fi

# Test --since-time flag
log "Testing --since-time flag..."
set +e
OUTPUT=$(pt-core agent plan --since-time "2h" --format json 2>&1)
EXIT_CODE=$?
set -e

if [ "$EXIT_CODE" -eq 0 ]; then
    log "✓ --since-time accepted (exit 0)"
else
    log "⚠ --since-time exit code $EXIT_CODE"
fi

# Test normal plan has no warning
log "Testing normal plan (no stub flags)..."
OUTPUT=$(pt-core agent plan --format json 2>&1)
if echo "$OUTPUT" | jq -e ".stub_flags" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    log "⚠ Normal plan has stub_flags (should not)"
else
    log "✓ Normal plan has no stub_flags section"
fi

# Test help mentions stub flags
log "Testing help output..."
HELP=$(pt-core agent plan --help 2>&1)
if echo "$HELP" | grep -q "since"; then
    log "✓ Help mentions --since"
else
    log "✗ Help should mention --since"
    exit 1
fi

if echo "$HELP" | grep -qi "coming\|v1.2\|future\|planned"; then
    log "✓ Help indicates feature is upcoming"
else
    log "⚠ Help might not indicate feature is upcoming"
fi

log "=== E2E Test PASSED ==="
```","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CobaltBeaver","created_at":"2026-01-22T18:38:26.764582930Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T06:15:28.652172776Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3jpe","depends_on_id":"bd-v5ba","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-02T00:30:54Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":1,"issue_id":"bd-3jpe","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented stub flags for --since, --since-time, --goal, --include-predictions. Plan generates normally with stub_flags warning section. Updated docs.","created_at":"2026-01-23T02:42:21Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-3k9b","title":"E2E: bundle encryption + verification flows","description":"## Goal
Validate bundle encryption/decryption and checksum verification end-to-end with detailed logging and failure-path coverage.

## Scope
- `pt bundle create --encrypt` with passphrase arg and env var.
- `pt bundle inspect` + `extract` with verification on/off.
- Failure modes: wrong passphrase, corrupted bundle, missing manifest.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs: event, cmd, exit_code, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Artifacts: encrypted bundle, inspect output, extract output, manifest, stderr snapshots.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Encrypted bundles decrypt with correct passphrase only.
- [ ] Verification detects corruption.
- [ ] Failure paths produce clear errors + logs.
- [ ] JSONL logs emitted per case.

## Test Plan
- E2E script generates bundle from fixture session and exercises encrypt/decrypt/verify.

 {"id":"bd-3kk2","title":"No-mock inference + ledger regression suite","description":"## Goal
Build a no-mock, deterministic regression suite for inference/posterior math and the evidence ledger.

## Scope / Subtasks
- Capture **realistic evidence fixtures** from live runs (CPU/IO/TTY/orphan/parent/cgroup/net), store as versioned test data.
- End-to-end inference pipeline on fixtures (collection features -> posterior -> confidence -> ledger), **no mocks**.
- Golden outputs for:
  - posterior class scores + confidence labels
  - top evidence factors with contributions and ordering
  - any derived summaries used by agent/TUI outputs
- Property tests:
  - posterior normalization (sum≈1)
  - monotonicity for key signals (e.g., longer idle increases P(abandoned))
  - sensitivity to missing evidence (graceful degradation)
- Numeric stability regression tests (NaN/Inf handling, underflow protection).

## No-mock Policy (Commentary)
- Use recorded fixtures and **actual inference code paths**; no trait mocks or fake implementations.
- Deterministic seeds and fixed fixtures for repeatability.
- Golden output updates require explicit approval (guardrail against drifting expectations).

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs per test case: fixture_id, posterior summary, top factors, confidence labels, runtime.
- Log schema fields: event, timestamp, phase, case_id, command, exit_code, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Redact/normalize any sensitive command strings in logs.
- Store artifacts under `test/artifacts/inference/<case>/` for CI upload.

## E2E Coverage
- Add `test/inference_e2e.bats` that runs `pt agent plan` on a fixture session and validates output schema + ledger summary.
- E2E uses runner harness (process_triage-aii.7.7) and emits JSONL logs using the shared schema.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Inference on fixtures produces stable outputs (golden tests).
- [ ] Posterior outputs normalized and within defined tolerance.
- [ ] Evidence ledger ordering and contributions validated.
- [ ] Failure modes (NaN/Inf/empty evidence) covered deterministically.
- [ ] JSONL logs emitted per test case with stable schema.
- [ ] E2E fixture plan run validates output schema + ledger summary.

## Test Plan
- Unit: golden inference cases + property checks.
- Integration: pipeline from fixture -> features -> posterior -> ledger.
- E2E: fixture plan run with JSONL logging.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:05:11.073333494Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T19:59:27.429650501Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3kk2","depends_on_id":"bd-jg2d","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-02T19:59:27.429597853Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3kk2","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:05:11.086052876Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3kk2","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:05:11.093432894Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3kk2","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-02T18:22:21.790324959Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3kk2","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-02T19:45:24.660814698Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3p7w","title":"E2E coverage remaining surfaces (shadow/diff/telemetry/config/bundle-enc)","description":"## Goal
Fill remaining end-to-end integration coverage gaps with rich JSONL logging + artifacts.

## Scope (Child Tasks)
- Shadow mode lifecycle (start/run/stop/export/report).
- Session diff/compare workflows (pt diff + agent diff).
- Telemetry maintenance (status/prune/retention).
- Config preset workflows (list/show/diff/export/validate).
- Bundle encryption/verification flows (passphrase env + CLI).
- Output formatting modes (fields/compact/TOON/truncation).
- Capabilities manifest + cache flows (agent capabilities).
- Supervision gating + protected patterns (plan/action guardrails).

## Logging & Artifacts
- All E2E scripts emit JSONL logs with shared schema + artifact manifests.
- Failure-mode coverage required (invalid inputs, missing files, wrong passphrase, malformed policy).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each listed surface has deterministic E2E coverage in CI.
- [ ] JSONL logs + artifact manifests validate for every script.
- [ ] Negative-paths are explicitly validated for each surface.

 {"id":"bd-3t22","title":"E2E: capabilities manifest + cache","description":"## Goal
Validate agent capabilities manifest generation + cache behavior end-to-end.

## Scope
- `pt agent capabilities --format json` schema validation.
- Cache hit/miss behavior (first run vs second run).
- Negative paths: unreadable cache dir, invalid cache contents.
- Consume fixtures produced by bd-1591 + bd-z3ma.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs: event, cmd, cache_hit, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Artifacts: raw outputs, schema validation reports, manifest.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Capabilities output is schema-valid and deterministic.
- [ ] Cache behavior validated across runs.
- [ ] Error paths produce clear messages.
- [ ] JSONL logs + artifact manifests validate.

## Test Plan
- E2E script via shared harness with fixtures.
